sources.institution: Ministry of Economy and Finance of Uzbekistan

candidates.title: A roundtable discussion was held on the development of small and medium-sized businesses and increasing employment in Uzbekistan
candidates.summary: On May 5 of this year, a high-level roundtable discussion was held at the Ministry of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan, dedicated to the development of small and medium-sized businesses and the acceleration of sustainable job creation.
candidates.source_institution: Ministry of Economy and Finance of Uzbekistan
caveats: Deterministic extraction from configured source text.

candidates.title: Discussions on cooperation were held with the head of the company ACWA Power
candidates.summary: On May 4, 2026, a meeting was held in Samarkand between Muhammad Abunayyan, the head of the Saudi Arabian company ACWA Power, and Jamshid Kuchkarov, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan, on the sidelines of the 59th Annual Meeting of the Asian Development Bank's Board of Governors.
candidates.source_institution: Ministry of Economy and Finance of Uzbekistan
caveats: Deterministic extraction from configured source text.
Unreviewed candidate; not an official reviewed policy database entry.

candidates.title: A new stage of international cooperation to support small and medium-sized businesses and create new jobs will be discussed
candidates.summary: On May 5 of this year, the Ministry of Economy and Finance will host a high-level roundtable dedicated to the development of small and medium-sized businesses and the expansion of job creation.
candidates.source_institution: Ministry of Economy and Finance of Uzbekistan
caveats: Deterministic extraction from configured source text.
Unreviewed candidate; not an official reviewed policy database entry.

candidates.title: Discussions Held on Prospects for Expanding Cooperation with the Chairman of JBIC
candidates.summary: On May 3, 2026, a meeting was held in Samarkand between Nobumitsu Hayashi, Chairman of the Board of the Japan Bank for International Cooperation (JBIC), and Jamshid Kuchkarov, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan, on the sidelines of the 59th Annual Meeting of the Asian Development Bank's Board of Governors.
candidates.source_institution: Ministry of Economy and Finance of Uzbekistan
caveats: Deterministic extraction from configured source text.
Unreviewed candidate; not an official reviewed policy database entry.

candidates.title: Meeting Held with Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Korea
candidates.summary: On May 3, 2026, a meeting was held on the sidelines of the 59th Annual Meeting of the Board of Governors of the Asian Development Bank in Samarkand between the Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Korea, Koo Yun-cheol and the Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan, Jamshid Kuchkarov, and the Deputy Prime Minister of the Republic of Uzbekistan, Jamshid Khodjaev.
candidates.source_institution: Ministry of Economy and Finance of Uzbekistan
caveats: Deterministic extraction from configured source text.

candidates.title: An agreement was signed with the German Agency for International Cooperation (GIZ) to attract a €9 million grant to strengthen green economic development in the regions of Uzbekistan based on master plans
candidates.summary: On April 30, 2026, a meeting was held between Joachim Fritz, Country Director of the German Agency for International Cooperation (GIZ) in Uzbekistan, Beate Schoreit, a Program Manager in Uzbekistan, and Ilkhom Norkulov, First Deputy Minister of Economy and Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

candidates.title: SPIRITUAL AND ENLIGHTENMENT EVENT HELD TO MARK THE 85TH BIRTH ANNIVERSARY OF ABDULLA ORIPOV
candidates.summary: On April 30, 2026, the Ministry of Economy and Finance hosted a spiritual and enlightenment event dedicated to the 85th birth anniversary of Abdulla Oripov, People's Poet of Uzbekistan, Hero of Uzbekistan, and author of the National Anthem.
